title: SuperSimpleHome
description: A Flexible Home Point Setting Mod For Servers.
body:
A Flexible Home Point Setting Mod For Servers.

# Installation
Just Drop The Jar Into Your Server's Mods Folder.

For Legacy Version Support (Minecraft v1.19-v1.21.10), Please Download The Mod v1.2.4.

# Commands

* **"home.set <_Name_>" - Create/Set A Home Point.**
* **"home.go <_Name_>" - Teleport To A Home Point.**
* **"home.cancel" - Cancel A Scheduled Teleport.**
* **"home.remove <_Name_>" - Remove A Home Point.**
* **"home.list" - List Your Home Points.**
* **"home.rename <_OldName_, _NewName_>" - Rename A Home Point.**
* **"home.back" - Return To Where You Were Before A HomePoint Warp / Death.**
* **"home.config.default <_Name_>" - The The Default Home Name.**
* **"home.config.max <_Max_>" - Set The Maximum Number Of Home Points A Single Player Can Have.**
* **"home.config.delay <_Delay_>" - Set The Delay That A Player Has To Wait Before Teleporting, In Seconds.**
* **"home.config.cancel-source <_Source_>" - Toggle A Cancellation Source.**

# Config
The Config Subcommands Require The Player Running Them To Have Operator Status.

The Config Splits Each Player's Homes Into It's Own Config File, Loaded When The Player Joins, And Unloaded When They Leave To Reduce Memory Usage.
